brand.name: Alex Rivera
brand.current_sales_process: Mainly cold email and organic Instagram. Sometimes referrals.
brand.core_offer: We build automated email marketing flows that recover 20% of abandoned carts and increase LTV without ad spend.
brand.lead_gen: Sending 500 cold emails a day and posting 3 reels a week.
brand.closing_mech: Usually a 30-min Zoom discovery call and then a proposal.
brand.delivery: We have a Slack channel, onboard them in 48 hours, and push the first flows live in 7 days.
brand.goals: Hit $100k MRR ($1.2M run rate) with 60% margins.
brand.bottleneck: Leads. We have a great offer but no predictable inbound mechanism.
brand.investment: I can invest 10 hours a week and $2,000/month.

personas.name: E-commerce Entrepreneur
personas.description: Ambitious e-commerce store owner seeking to optimize email marketing and increase customer lifetime value

personas.name: Growth-Oriented Store Owner
personas.description: Growth-oriented e-commerce store owner looking to scale their business and stay competitive
